## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO and content marketing partnership between Zencastr and GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zencastr, a leading podcast creation platform, seeks to leverage its strong domain authority for SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation services, producing 25-100 articles/month for $9k-$12k](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines AI workflows with human expertise for high-quality, scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Content refreshes and programmatic SEO could significantly boost Zencastr's organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Topics

### Zencastr Background

  - [Founded in 2016, initially for musicians, now a major podcast creation platform](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Records 4K video and 44.1 kHz audio in-browser](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Grown organically without dedicated marketing function](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Strong domain authority with \~1 million backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [CEO Adrian Lopez has SEO background](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [250-step workflow from keyword selection to final article](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Services include keyword research, content briefs, outlines, and full article production](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Integrates client's product documentation and brand positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Handles technical SEO, including schema markup and site migrations](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Content Strategies

  - [Editorial content: 25 articles/month for $9k](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: 100 pages/month for $12k](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Content refreshes to revitalize old blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Focus on low-volume, "blue ocean" keywords for programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Results and Timelines

  - [Indexing typically occurs within days for aged domains](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Click improvements visible within 2-3 weeks of content publication](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Shared case study: steadily.com grew from 20k to 120k organic visits in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [90-day pilot period to evaluate partnership effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Statement of Work (SOW) and contract template](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Adrian to review with co-founder and legal/finance teams](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Potential mid-March start date if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Zencastr team to Slack for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/Y59YMScQVNfCmppkDkRVzLUMamvEbi9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
